preliminary_expected_failures.failure_reason: CP00-083 evidence files were not created yet; contract and closeout rows already pointed at docs/closeout-packs/cp00-083.

claude_review_command.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --output-format json < CP00-083 diff prompt

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: One valid claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review completed before production_ready.
evidence_summary.upstream_boundary: CP00-083 consumes CP00-082 and requires upstream next_subphase RP00.P07.M03.S20.
evidence_summary.finding_resolution: Claude P3 CP00-083-F2 was fixed by adding missing bound-flag and non-object guard assertions; CP00-083-F1 was adjudicated as accepted non-blocking metadata-only cross-reference risk.
evidence_summary.ldip_boundary: LDIP remains planning-only; no LDIP implementation is introduced by CP00-083.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

CP00-083 is metadata-only and does not execute runtime error responses, retry, rollback, compensation, incident creation, observability writes, runtime permission, AuthZ, security trimming, audit, database, storage, idempotency, lock, product-state, review-queue, or LDIP implementation logic.

plan_generation_receipt.purpose: Regenerate closeout pack plan and next-pack queue after CP00-083 evidence assembly.
plan_generation_receipt.result_summary: Generated docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json with 1170 packs and 53761 units; generated docs/closeout-pack-plan/next-pack-queue.json with 11 locked/corrected next-queue packs; queue starts after CP00-083.
